ses.receiptfilter.filter.IpFilter.Description: A structure that provides the IP addresses to block or allow, and whether to block or allow incoming mail from them.

ses.receiptfilter.filter.Name.Description: The name of the IP address filter. The name must meet the following requirements:  + Contain only ASCII letters (a-z, A-Z), numbers (0-9), underscores (_), or dashes (-).+ Start and end with a letter or number.+ Contain 64 characters or fewer.
